title: WHY? — the seven motivations list (mom, Maya, Jann, Brenda, dad, woman, beauty)
html:
TL;DR

  • July 2022 seven-line "WHY?" list — the rawest extant statement of Yahir's motivation roots at age 20.
  • Targets named explicitly: buy mom a riverfront home, free mom of financial troubles, get maya to Mexico, travel with dad, make Jann and Brenda proud, live a beautiful and impressive life, be gangster and pull bitches (but hopefully just the one woman), make my father proud.
  • Earliest written instance of the "buy mom a riverfront home" line — the mom house by the river goal that recurs through 2026.
  • Two parental approval lines back-to-back: "make Jann and Brenda proud" (chosen mentors) AND "make my father proud" (biological dad). The dual-parent-figure structure is load-bearing across Yahir's later notes.
  • "to be gangster and pull bitches (but hopefully just the one woman)" — adolescent-bravado-with-immediate-self-correction is a classic Yahir register, see 2022 09 04 i have never been in love for the same person being wistful three months later.

Key quotes

"buy mom a riverfront home"

"free mom of financial troubles and responsibilities"

"make Jann and Brenda proud"

"make my father proud"

"to be gangster and pull bitches (but hopefully just the one woman)"

Why it matters

This is a pure manifesto — no admin, no junk-drawer, just the answers to why am I trying so hard. Compare with 2022 10 25 ahmad jamal stream which has the same goals embedded inside 460 lines of project clutter. This note is the index card version.

The list has not changed materially in four years. Every founder-grind note (2024 brotein, 2025 Austin move, 2026 rankett) operates inside this seven-bullet frame.

The dual "make Jann and Brenda proud" + "make my father proud" shows the two-parent structure: chosen mentors and biological dad both load-bearing, neither dropped.

Open questions

  • Was the "riverfront home" already specified to be in Oregon, or did Mexico/Texas surface later?
  • Has maya been taken to Mexico yet? (No evidence in 2026 vault as of this writing.)
  • Did the "live a beautiful and impressive life" line ever get unpacked into something less abstract?

Wikilinks
